tests.name: t1
tests.prompt: Skriv en PRD för en ny dashboard-feature.
assertions: Starts with the problem rather than the solution
Identifies risks or things that could go wrong

tests.name: t2
tests.prompt: Vad är viktigast att börja med i en PRD?
assertions: Emphasizes starting with the problem, not the solution
Mentions that goals should be measurable
